name: Clear Nights
author: RainDance
description: This mod adds two small modules designed to work best with RainyDays: --- Constellations are a new consumable type that provides persistent buffs to multiple poker hands for the rest of your run. Find them in booster packs and shops to build long-term synergy. --- Play two new decks, each with a unique mechanic, offering new challenges and changing the way you play the game.
